reviews.comment:
Tiene para cargar aire en el mismo sector que donde cargas nafta. Me parece muy práctico ya que siempre es difícil hacer fila para cargar el aire de las ruedas o nunca anda. En este lugar andaban perfectamente y había muchas

(Translated by Google)
They have an air pump in the same area as the gas pump. I find it very convenient since it's always difficult to wait in line to get your tires inflated, or they're never working. Here, they worked perfectly, and there were plenty of them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2NktERWt3RRAB
